test_protocol.name: EIS at 50% SOC, 25°C
test_protocol.description: Electrochemical impedance spectroscopy sweep from 100 kHz to 10 mHz with a 10 mV AC perturbation amplitude. Cell is brought to 50% state of charge before measurement and held at open-circuit potential for 2 hours to reach equilibrium. Galvanostatic EIS mode.

notes: EIS spectrum is typically collected after a C/10 capacity check to set SOC accurately.
Ten mV perturbation amplitude is appropriate for most lithium-ion cells; reduce to 5 mV for cells with low internal resistance.
Lower frequency limit of 10 mHz captures the diffusion tail (Warburg region) for solid-state diffusion characterisation.
